[4935]
Security Advisory on Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities on Archer BE230 (CVE-2026-0630, CVE-2026-0631, CVE-2026-22221-22227, CVE-2026-22229). Archer AXE75 (CVE-2026-0630 and CVE-2026-22225), Archer AX73 (CVE-2026-22226), and Deco BE25 (CVE-2026-22229)

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: [4935] Security Advisory on Authenticated Command Injection Vulnerabilities on Archer BE230 (CVE-2026-0630, CVE-2026-0631, CVE-2026-22221-22227, CVE-2026-22229). Archer AXE75 (CVE-2026-0630 and CVE-2026-22225), Archer AX73 (CVE-2026-22226), and Deco BE25 (CVE-2026-22229)
